description: special municipality and capital city of Taiwan
description_wiki: Taipei ( ; traditional Chinese: 臺北; simplified Chinese: 台北; pinyin: Táiběi; Zhuyin Fuhao: ㄊㄞˊ ㄅㄟˇ pronounced:[tʰǎɪpèɪ]; Tâi-gí: Tâi-pak), officially Taipei City, is the capital and a special municipality of Taiwan.
Taiwan, officially the Republic of China (ROC), is a country in East Asia.

aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.

aliases: Brooklyn, New York City, New York
description: borough of New York City, New York, United States
description_wiki: Brooklyn is the most populous of the five boroughs of New York City, coextensive with Kings County, in the U.S. state of New York.

aliases: Staten Island borough, New York City
description: borough of New York City, New York, United States of America
description_wiki: Staten Island  ( STAT-ən) is the southernmost of the five boroughs of New York City, coextensive with Richmond County and situated at the southernmost point of the State of New York.

description: public research university in Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: The University of Minnesota Twin Cities (historically known as University of Minnesota) is a public land-grant research university in the Twin Cities of Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States.

description: major branch of Chinese spoken across most of northern and southwestern China
description_wiki: Mandarin (  MAN-dər-in) is the largest branch of the Sinitic languages.
Burmese is a Tibeto-Burman language spoken in Myanmar, where it is the official language, lingua franca, and the native language of the Bamar, the country's largest ethnic group.

aliases: Republic of the Union of Myanmar

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.
